summary: Teams Level Feature testing complete. Backend: 25/25 tests pass. Frontend: All 3 user scenarios verified (advanced, standard, null). The new 'level' field correctly replaces 'connection_mode' and all UI wording matches the specification.

backend: test_marie_teams_has_unavailable_reason - Marie has unavailable_reason about Outlook
frontend: Clara (advanced): Shows 'Réunion Teams créée automatiquement via votre compte Microsoft Pro'
Clara (advanced): Shows 'Teams avancé activé' banner in Outlook card
Sandrine (standard): Shows 'Microsoft Teams disponible via votre compte Outlook'
Sandrine (standard): Shows 'Création de réunion' badge (not 'Création automatique')
Sandrine (standard): Shows upgrade prompt about Teams avancé
Sandrine (standard): Shows 'Teams avancé (optionnel)' banner with 'Activer Teams avancé' button
Marie (null): Shows 'Connectez votre calendrier Outlook pour activer Microsoft Teams'
Marie (null): Shows 'Configuration avancée (Azure AD)' link instead of direct config button
Marie (null): Info box mentions connecting Outlook

GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status.teams.unavailable_reason: Connectez votre calendrier Outlook pour activer Microsoft Teams.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo users with pre-configured calendar connections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teams Level Feature verified. Key changes from previous iteration: (1) 'level' field replaces 'connection_mode' with values: 'advanced' (Outlook + has_online_meetings_scope), 'standard' (Outlook without scope), 'application' (legacy Azure AD form), null (no connection), (2) 'has_attendance' is true only for level=advanced, (3) 'can_auto_generate' is true for both advanced and standard levels (calendar mode works for standard), (4) Frontend wording: advanced='Réunion Teams créée automatiquement via votre compte Microsoft Pro', standard='Microsoft Teams disponible via votre compte Outlook', null='Connectez votre calendrier Outlook pour activer Microsoft Teams', (5) Feature badges: advanced shows 'Création automatique' + 'Récupération de présences', standard shows only 'Création de réunion', (6) Not-connected state shows 'Configuration avancée (Azure AD)' link instead of direct config button. Test users: Clara (advanced), Sandrine (standard), Marie (null).
